Chordata > Ascidiacea > > >

Orange-spotted ascidians (Ascidiacea)

Class Ascidiacea

Updated Mar 2020

Where seen?

These small blobs with bright orange spots are sometimes seen on some of our shores .

Features

Colony about 5-8cm in diameter. Rubbery blobs found near seagrasses. Dark blue background with bright orange spots arranged in petal-like shapes.

Sentosa, Nov 11
Cyrene Reef, Jun 12

*Species are difficult to positively identify without examination of internal parts.

On this website, they are grouped by external features for convenience of display.*

Orange-spotted ascidians on Singapore shores

On wildsingapore flickr

  • Photos for free download
  • Map of sightings in Singapore
